title: Cuneiform Tablet #0288: Ur III Magical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a magical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a magical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Magical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records magical matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
